patch_notes: FIXED CRITICAL AEGIS SLIPSTREAM BUG CAUSING NON-ENGLISH PATCHES TO NOT BE DOWNLOADED AND APPLIED CORRECTLY
FIXED BUG CAUSING HOTFIX DATA TO DISPLAY INCORRECTLY WHEN SWAPPING LANGUAGE
FIXED BUG CAUSING RANDOMIZER MODULE TO NOT LOAD CAD DATA FROM CORRECT SOURCE
AUGMENTED AEGIS PROTOCOL TO INSTANTLY PING SERVERS WHEN APP IS BROUGHT BACK TO FOREGROUND
FIXED BUG CAUSING BACKGROUND IMAGE TO SHIFT WHEN KEYBOARD IS BROUGHT UP
CHANGED TEXT COLOURS FOR VARIOUS ELEMENTS FOR READABILITY
